title: Complete the 3-round session and reach the decision screen
description: A matched visitor can progress through all three rounds by answering only when it is their turn and then reach the decision screen at the end.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a valid alias into the alias field
Submit the find-a-stranger action to enter matchmaking
Wait for the session to start after a match is found
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 1
Wait for the waiting-for-stranger state while the stranger takes their turn
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 2
Wait for the waiting-for-stranger state while the stranger takes their turn
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 3
Verify the decision screen is displayed after all rounds complete

title: Submit valid alias and proceed to waiting room
description: Verifies a visitor can enter a valid alias, confirm the reveal modal, and be taken to the waiting room.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Icebreaker_01 into the alias field
Submit the alias to request a match
Confirm the reveal modal to proceed
Verify the user lands in the waiting room

title: Stay connected and get a shareable link
description: After completing the conversation, choosing to stay connected leads to a matched outcome where a shareable link is presented.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a valid alias into the alias field
Submit the find-a-stranger action to enter matchmaking
Wait for the session to start after a match is found
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 1
Wait for the waiting-for-stranger state while the stranger takes their turn
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 2
Wait for the waiting-for-stranger state while the stranger takes their turn
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 3
Choose the option to stay connected
Verify a matched outcome is displayed and a shareable link is presented

title: Waiting room shows active waiting state after joining queue
description: Verifies that after entering the waiting room the UI indicates the user is waiting in the matchmaking queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Icebreaker_03 into the alias field
Submit the alias to request a match
Confirm the reveal modal to proceed
Verify a waiting-for-match state is displayed

title: Vanish results in gone outcome with no share link
description: After completing the conversation, choosing to vanish results in a gone outcome where no shareable link is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a valid alias into the alias field
Submit the find-a-stranger action to enter matchmaking
Wait for the session to start after a match is found
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 1
Wait for the waiting-for-stranger state while the stranger takes their turn
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 2
Wait for the waiting-for-stranger state while the stranger takes their turn
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 3
Choose the option to vanish
Verify a gone outcome is displayed and no shareable link is shown

title: Cancel matchmaking from waiting room returns to landing
description: Verifies a visitor can leave the lobby from the waiting room and return to the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Icebreaker_04 into the alias field
Submit the alias to request a match
Confirm the reveal modal to proceed
Leave the lobby to cancel matchmaking
Verify the user returns to the landing page

title: Match again returns to landing and clears prior session state
description: From the result screen, the visitor can start over via match again and returns to the landing page ready for a new match without stale session state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a valid alias into the alias field
Submit the find-a-stranger action to enter matchmaking
Wait for the session to start after a match is found
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 1
Wait for the waiting-for-stranger state while the stranger takes their turn
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 2
Wait for the waiting-for-stranger state while the stranger takes their turn
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 3
Choose the option to stay connected
Click the match-again action
Verify the user lands on the landing page in a ready state to start matchmaking

title: Online stranger count displays on landing
description: Verifies the landing page shows an online indicator with a visible online stranger count.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify an online stranger count is displayed

title: Online stranger count displays in waiting room
description: Verifies the waiting room displays an online stranger count panel while waiting for a match.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Icebreaker_02 into the alias field
Submit the alias to request a match
Confirm the reveal modal to proceed
Verify an online stranger count is displayed in the waiting room

title: Prevent answering out of turn
description: A matched visitor cannot submit an answer when it is not their turn and remains in the waiting state with a visible validation/rejection.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a valid alias into the alias field
Submit the find-a-stranger action to enter matchmaking
Wait for the session to start after a match is found
Wait until the UI indicates it is not your turn
Attempt to select an answer option while it is not your turn
Verify an out-of-turn validation/rejection is visible

title: Copy the share link after matching
description: After both users stay connected, the visitor can copy the share link and sees a UI confirmation that it was copied.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a valid alias into the alias field
Submit the find-a-stranger action to enter matchmaking
Wait for the session to start after a match is found
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 1
Wait for the waiting-for-stranger state while the stranger takes their turn
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 2
Wait for the waiting-for-stranger state while the stranger takes their turn
When it is your turn, select an answer option for round 3
Choose the option to stay connected
Click the control to copy the share link
Verify a copy confirmation is visible

title: Reject empty alias submission
description: Verifies that submitting without an alias shows a validation error and does not start matchmaking.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill  into the alias field
Submit the alias to request a match
Verify an alias required validation error is visible

title: Reject alias with invalid characters
description: Verifies that submitting an alias with disallowed characters shows a validation error and does not proceed to the reveal modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Bad@lias! into the alias field
Submit the alias to request a match
Verify an alias validation error is visible

title: Reject alias longer than 20 characters
description: Verifies that submitting an alias exceeding the maximum length shows a validation error and blocks progression.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill ThisAliasIsWayTooLong123 into the alias field
Submit the alias to request a match
Verify an alias length validation error is visible

title: Read safety guidance
description: An anonymous visitor can navigate to the safety page and see the safety information content displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /safety
Verify static safety information is displayed

title: Reject whitespace-only alias submission
description: Verifies that an alias consisting only of whitespace is treated as invalid and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill      into the alias field
Submit the alias to request a match
Verify an alias validation error is visible

title: Read philosophy/about information
description: An anonymous visitor can navigate to the philosophy page and see the philosophy/about content displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /philosophy
Verify philosophy/about information is displayed
